perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man in a grey sweater and a flat cap gesturing towards the camera while a variety of text overlays appear. (2) The scene transitions to a close-up of an iPhone screen, where hands are seen navigating through the 'Settings' menu to 'Photos' and toggling the 'Keep Originals' option. (3) The camera then shows a photo of a Corgi in the Photos app, selecting the 'Share' button and enabling 'All Photos Data' in the options. (4) Finally, the man returns to the frame with an excited expression as a large text overlay confirms the success of the process, ending with a close-up of the dog.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic background track begins immediately. (2) A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin, explaining a common issue with photo quality. (3) Subtle clicking sound effects (SFX) play in sync with screen interactions during the tutorial phase. (4) The music and vocal tone maintain high energy until the video concludes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '為什麼我用 AirDrop' (Hook, inquisitive tone) (2) '畫質怪怪的!' (Decorative, frustrated tone) (3) '那是因為你這個設定沒有做' (Functional, informative tone) (4) '點開 設定 > 照片' (Functional, instructional) (5) '保留原始檔' (Functional, highlighting setting name) (6) '分享 > 選項' (Functional, instructional) (7) '所有照片資料' (Functional, highlighting setting name) (8) '100% 原味照片啦!' (Decorative, celebratory tone).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim) appearing throughout; hands visible during phone demo.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male wearing a grey knit sweater, glasses, and a blue/grey patterned flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A dark, neutral studio background with a laptop and some equipment visible in the blurred distance during the phone close-up shots.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a practical tech tip for iPhone users on how to transfer photos via AirDrop without losing data or quality. The video uses a 'pain point' (low-quality transfers) to grab attention and offers a step-by-step visual guide as the solution.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Tutorial focuses on native OS features rather than a specific paid third-party app.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Creator's signature flat cap and high-energy tutorial style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video is highly optimized for short-form social media (TikTok/Reels/Shorts) with high-density text and fast pacing to maintain engagement.
